### Post by mooseroo on 2006-08-25
I've got a Micron machine that has onboard Intel i810. I've followed a number of tutorials on getting XGL running (cause it's so pretty) but I'm always coming up without a working XGL session. Any glaring errors?

Xorg.conf

### Post by T8y8 on 2006-08-26
Honestly, I'd recommend AIGLX for an i810, XGL made it laggy and slow for me, but AIGLX runs smoothly.

[http://www.ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=145068](http://www.ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=145068)

But if you specifically want XGL I hope someone can offer better advice than I.

---

### Post by nalmeth on 2006-08-26
The link T8y8 was the one I used on my i810, and it worked perfectly.

I don't suppose you're on 64-bit are you?

---
